subcodes.first_line: Thy letter was received and its contents were presented at His Most Holy Court. The sweet fragrance of Divine love was wafted therefrom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ات رسید نظر ... در ساحت اقدس عرض شد عرف محبت الهی از ان متضوع
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
